docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DIRECT LANGUAGE PUBLISHING, INC./NICOLE HILL AS TO DEFENDANT FABER BOB INDDBA FABER EXTERIOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR DIRECT LANGUAGE PUBLISHING, INC./NICOLE HILL ASSIGNED TO BAY AREA CAPITAL, INC. DBA AMERICAN AGENCIES OF SF
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FABER BOB INDDBA FABER EXTERIOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT LANGUAGE PUBLISHING, INC./NICOLE HILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FABER BOB INDDBA FABER EXTERIOR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,530.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
